zh.lifeSummary: 當Fouque de Aulnay III於1035年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾時，他的父親Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville46歲，母親Kudo de Pothier26歲。他於1060年與Albreda de Lincolnshire在英國越可爾斯普洛特布盧結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1075年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fouque de Aulnay III于1035年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾时，他的父亲Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville46岁，母亲Kudo de Pothier26岁。他于1060年与Albreda de Lincolnshire在英国越可爾斯普洛特布盧结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1075年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fouque
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Jean-Michel, Marcel, Raoul.
French: from a pet form of the personal name Fouque, itself from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic names formed with folk ‘people’. Compare Fuqua and Fuquay .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered forms Fuqua and Fuquay) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Fouquette
meanings: Altered form of French Fouquet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

en.lifeSummary: When Fouque de Aulnay III was born in 1035, in Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville, was 46 and his mother, Kudo de Pothier, was 26. He married Albreda de Lincolnshire in 1060, in Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1075, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fouque de Aulnay III est né en 1035, à Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Kudo de Pothier, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Albreda de Lincolnshire en 1060, à Sprotbrough, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1075, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fouque de Aulnay III 1035 in Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville 46 und seine Mutter Kudo de Pothier 26. Er hat 1060 in Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England Albreda de Lincolnshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1075 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fouque de Aulnay III è nato il nel 1035 nel Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Kudo de Pothier, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Albreda de Lincolnshire nel 1060, nel Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1075, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fouque de Aulnay IIIが1035年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアで生まれた時，父Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centvilleは46歳，母Kudo de Pothierは26歳であった。1060年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウでAlbreda de Lincolnshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1075年にフランスピカーディソンメで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fouque de Aulnay III(이)가 1035년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Kudo de Pothier(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1060년 영국 요르크실르 스플로트브루그h에서 Albreda de Lincolnshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1075년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, England: Hodsock, Snotengaham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fouque de Aulnay III nasceu em 1035, em Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Kudo de Pothier, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Albreda de Lincolnshire em 1060, em Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1075, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fouque de Aulnay III родился в 1035 г. в местности эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Kudo de Pothier, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Albreda de Lincolnshire в 1060 г. в местности спротброую, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1075 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fouque de Aulnay III nació en 1035, en Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Kudo de Pothier, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Albreda de Lincolnshire en 1060, en Sprotbrough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1075, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 40 años.
